name: open multiple files at launch -> ONE window, tabs (not separate windows)
comment: Regression for the v2.7.0 multi-window bug: opening several files at once (launch args / Finder Open With / dragging multiple files onto the app icon) went through application(_:openFiles:), which opened each file in a SEPARATE window after tabbingMode changed .preferred->.automatic. The fix routes that path through EditorWindowController.openFiles(at:) (explicit addTabbedWindow). This drives the same code via launchFiles (3 files) and asserts exactly ONE window remains. Requires the Debug build (sandbox off) and staged fixtures (run stage-fixtures.sh).
